label: Appointment
description: A booking request form. Submissions open directly in WhatsApp or email — no backend needed.

props.label: After booking, also open
props.help: Every request is saved to your Appointments page. This additionally opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat or email using your Business Info.

props.label: Services to choose from
props.help: Adds a Service dropdown. When you list services here, choosing one becomes compulsory.

props.label: Booking
props.heading: Book an appointment
props.sub: Pick a time that suits you and we'll confirm shortly.
